title: Compound Time (6/8, 9/8)
description: Explore meters where the beat naturally divides into threes instead of twos.

sessions.title: The Jig Feel
sessions.description: Learn how 6/8 time works and how to feel it in 2 big beats.
sessions.prompt: Explain 6/8 time signature. Clarify that while there are 6 eighth notes per measure, we usually feel it as two big beats (like a dotted quarter note) that divide into three eighth notes each. Provide an exercise in 6/8 time demonstrating this feeling using eighth notes and dotted quarter notes.

sessions.title: Expanding the Triple
sessions.prompt: Extend the concept of compound time to 9/8 (three big beats per measure) and 12/8 (four big beats per measure, like the blues). Provide an interactive exercise reading rhythms in 12/8 time.

levels.criteria: Can feel and count music in compound meter without confusing it for triplets.
